topic.title: How to Export a Video for TikTok or Instagram
topic.shortdesc: Learn the steps to export your finished video and share it on social media platforms.

section.title: Export Your Video
section.p: 1. Tap the "Export" or "Save" button (usually in the top-right corner).
2. Select your desired resolution (1080x1920 for TikTok and Instagram Reels).
4. Tap "Export" and wait for the video to render.

section.title: Share on Social Media
section.p: 1. Once the video is saved, tap "Share."
3. Add captions, hashtags, and other details.
